headline: Here's How Much a $1000 Investment in Keysight Made 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
summary: Why investing for the long run, especially if you buy certain popular stocks, could reap huge rewards.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Agilent Technologies, Lowers Price Target to $140
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Vijay Kumar   maintains Agilent Technologies (NYSE:A) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $160 to $140.
